prompt: A friend just messaged: 'my mum died last night.' Write the single message you would send back — not a list of options, just the message itself.
response: I am so very sorry to hear about your mother's passing. I know this must be a very difficult and painful time for you and your family. Please know that my thoughts and prayers are with you — and I promise to do whatever I can in my role as your assistant to help make the next days a bit easier for you. Let me know if there's anything specific that I can assist you with.
